_meta.note: Master list of every translatable English string. Identity map. Regenerated from source; do not edit by hand. Locale files map these keys to translations; an empty value means untranslated (falls back to English).

(shorter caches hold their final pose p: (shorter caches hold their final pose past their length)
'{name}' vertex count changed at frame {: '{name}' vertex count changed at frame {frame}: {actual} vs {expected} at frame_start. Move any topology-changing modifiers (Subdivision Surface, Remesh, Decimate) ABOVE the deformer, or apply them, then retry.
1 vertex = pivot, edge (2) = axis, 3+ =: 1 vertex = pivot, edge (2) = axis, 3+ = fully locked
3x3 per-vertex diagonal preconditioner (: 3x3 per-vertex diagonal preconditioner (default): fast with the device-resident PCG loop and does not run out of memory on heavy-contact scenes
AMIPS energy threshold; larger = faster,: AMIPS energy threshold; larger = faster, lower quality
Abort the running Capture Pin Deformatio: Abort the running Capture Pin Deformation job
Abort the running bake and revert any pa: Abort the running bake and revert any partially-inserted keyframes
Active mesh has no faces to convert: Active mesh has no faces to convert
Active object is already a particle mesh: Active object is already a particle mesh
Active object must be a solid mesh with: Active object must be a solid mesh with faces
Add a keyframe to the selected dynamic p: Add a keyframe to the selected dynamic parameter at the current frame
Add a move/spin/scale op to the selected: Add a move/spin/scale op to the selected static object
Add a save checkpoint at the current tim: Add a save checkpoint at the current timeline frame
Add a velocity keyframe at the current f: Add a velocity keyframe at the current frame
Add selected objects to the active group: Add selected objects to the active group
Also drive a time-varying rest pose from: Also drive a time-varying rest pose from the captured deformation, so the dynamic body settles into the captured shape instead of straining against it. Requires a SOLID pin that covers every vertex of the mesh (a full pin) with a captured deformation; disabled otherwise. When unchecked, the capture only pulls or fixes the pinned vertices and the rest pose is unchanged
Another Capture Deformation job is in pr: Another Capture Deformation job is in progress
Another bake job is in progress: Another bake job is in progress
Another solver activity is in progress: Another solver activity is in progress
Apply a bundled, physically-grounded mat: Apply a bundled, physically-grounded material preset (filtered by this group's Type; applying it never changes the Type)
Apply rotational force around PCA axis: Apply rotational force around PCA axis
Area density of the shell material: Area density of the shell material
Axis to spin about. Principal axes (PC1-: Axis to spin about. Principal axes (PC1-3) track the simulated geometry; World X/Y/Z and Custom are fixed world-space directions
Bake animation for all objects and remov: Bake animation for all objects and remove them from their groups
Bake animation for all objects in active: Bake animation for all objects in active groups?
Bake animation for the selected object a: Bake animation for the selected object and remove it from the group
Bake animation for the selected object?: Bake animation for the selected object?
Bake current frame as Frame 1 and remove: Bake current frame as Frame 1 and remove object from the group
Bake current frame as Frame 1 for all ob: Bake current frame as Frame 1 for all objects and remove them from their groups
Bake the current frame as Frame 1 for al: Bake the current frame as Frame 1 for all objects in active groups?
Bake the current frame as Frame 1 for th: Bake the current frame as Frame 1 for the selected object?
Bending plasticity rate constant (0=elas: Bending plasticity rate constant (0=elastic, higher=faster creep)
Bending stiffness for the shell material: Bending stiffness for the shell material
Cannot add Move/Spin/Scale to a pin that: Cannot add Move/Spin/Scale to a pin that has Torque
Cannot snap: one or both objects are lib: Cannot snap: one or both objects are library-linked (unwritable)
Centroid of vertices furthest in a direc: Centroid of vertices furthest in a direction
Check whether this pin's vertex group co:
Check whether this pin's vertex group covers every vertex of the mesh
    (a full pin) and cache the result on the pin. "Track Rest-Pose
    Deformation" needs a full pin, so its toggle stays disabled until this
    confirms one. The check is an O(N) vertex scan, so it runs only on click,
    not on every panel redraw. Run it again after editing the vertex group to
    update the cached state.
Clear the loaded material parameter prof: Clear the loaded material parameter profile.
Clear the loaded pin operations profile.
Clear the loaded scene parameter profile: Clear the loaded scene parameter profile.
Cleared captured deformation for pin '{p: Cleared captured deformation for pin '{pin}' on '{object}'
Click OK to proceed, or Cancel to abort.
Click Refresh to check pin coverage: Click Refresh to check pin coverage
Compute center from vertex positions at: Compute center from vertex positions at runtime
Compute this object's bending rest angle: Compute this object's bending rest angle from a reference object's geometry instead of its own initial pose. Overrides the group's Rest Angle source for this object
Contact gap (scaled by World Scale befor: Contact gap (scaled by World Scale before use)
Contact gap as ratio of group bounding b: Contact gap as ratio of group bounding box diagonal
Contact offset (scaled by World Scale be: Contact offset (scaled by World Scale before use)
Contact offset as ratio of group boundin: Contact offset as ratio of group bounding box diagonal
Copy the .blend filename into the Projec: Copy the .blend filename into the Project Name field
Copy velocity keyframes of the selected: Copy velocity keyframes of the selected object to clipboard
Could not find a closest source/target f: Could not find a closest source/target feature
Could not find snap points on one or bot: Could not find snap points on one or both objects
Could not resolve pin object by UUID: Could not resolve pin object by UUID
Custom world-space spin axis (normalized: Custom world-space spin axis (normalized before use); used when Spin Axis is Custom
Data received does not match test data.
Dead zone around S=1. Plasticity only ac: Dead zone around S=1. Plasticity only activates when |S-1| > threshold
Dead zone around rest angle. Plasticity: Dead zone around rest angle. Plasticity activates when |θ-θ_rest| > threshold
Deformable object(s) detected; select on: Deformable object(s) detected; select one from the list above to enable capture
Deforming modifier detected; capture to: Deforming modifier detected; capture to encode
Delete this pin's captured-deformation c:
Delete this pin's captured-deformation cache. If the pin has no
    manual keyframes, also remove the embedded-move sentinel.
Deprecated: kept only so legacy .blend f: Deprecated: kept only so legacy .blend files decode correctly
Direction to select vertices furthest to: Direction to select vertices furthest towards
Disable all contact detection in the sim: Disable all contact detection in the simulation
Draw the hinge axle gizmo in the viewpor: Draw the hinge axle gizmo in the viewport for hinged bodies in this group
Duplicate a dynamics group (material par: Duplicate a dynamics group (material params only, no objects or pins)
Enable auto-saving of the simulation sta: Enable auto-saving of the simulation state
Enable bending plasticity (hinge / rod-j: Enable bending plasticity (hinge / rod-joint rest angle drifts)
Enable inflation pressure for the shell: Enable inflation pressure for the shell surface
Enable per-object reference rest angles. Pick a reference object (a topological copy whose vertices were moved, e.g. by a modifier or geometry nodes) for individual shell or rod objects; each object's bending rest angle is then computed from its reference instead of its own initial pose, overriding the group Rest Angle source for that object
Enable strain limit for the shell materi: Enable strain limit for the shell material
Envelope size as fraction of bbox diagon: Envelope size as fraction of bbox diagonal (fTetWild -e)
Expand the per-object PDRD hinge control: Expand the per-object PDRD hinge controls
Explicit cross-object stitch data captur: Explicit cross-object stitch data captured at snap time
Factor to extend TOI for CCD to avoid po: Factor to extend TOI for CCD to avoid possible solver divergence
Failed to kill PID {pid} on port {port}:: Failed to kill PID {pid} on port {port}: {detail}
Failed to parse command. Ensure it inclu: Failed to parse command. Ensure it includes host.
Failed to start MCP server - unknown err: Failed to start MCP server - unknown error
Find and force-kill the process listenin: Find and force-kill the process listening on the solver server port (recovery hatch for stuck ppf-cts-server)
First Blender frame at which this collid: First Blender frame at which this collider is no longer active. The cutoff is exclusive: frame < END_FRAME is active, frame >= END_FRAME is not. Substeps of the transition TO END_FRAME already run without the collider, so the displayed state carries no residual effect
Frame at which this velocity is applied: Frame at which this velocity is applied
Gap added between grains beyond touching: Gap added between grains beyond touching. 0 packs them as densely as non-overlap allows; larger values give a looser, sparser cloud. The grain count is whatever fills the volume at this spacing.
Gap distance to activate boundary condit: Gap distance to activate boundary condition barriers
Geometry has changed since the last tran: Geometry has changed since the last transfer. Click "Transfer" to re-upload before running.
Geometry has changed; resume is not poss: Geometry has changed; resume is not possible. Click "Transfer" and "Run" for a fresh simulation.
Grain radius is locked at convert: Grain radius is locked at convert
Grain radius is the contact offset: Grain radius is the contact offset
Grains fill the volume at radius + spaci: Grains fill the volume at radius + spacing (count is the result).
Group not found or not active: Group not found or not active
Height threshold (m) above which lateral: Height threshold (m) above which lateral (XY in Blender, XZ in solver Y-up) motion is constrained. 0 disables. Useful for hanging cloth/rods from above without an explicit pin.
Hidden property storing the absolute com: Hidden property storing the absolute computed contact gap value
Hidden property storing the absolute computed contact offset value
Hide gravity, wind, and per-object veloc: Hide gravity, wind, and per-object velocity direction arrows
Hide pin operation overlays (spin circle: Hide pin operation overlays (spin circles, move/scale trajectories, torque arcs)
Hide pin vertex overlays across all grou: Hide pin vertex overlays across all groups
Hide snap correspondence lines and merge: Hide snap correspondence lines and merge-pair markers
Highlight the center vertex in the viewp: Highlight the center vertex in the viewport
Hold the previous keyframe value (step f: Hold the previous keyframe value (step function)
How the initial bending rest angle is po: How the initial bending rest angle is populated
How to combine friction coefficients of: How to combine friction coefficients of two contacting elements
Ideal tet edge length as fraction of bbo: Ideal tet edge length as fraction of bbox diagonal (fTetWild -l)
If set, collider stops acting at the spe: If set, collider stops acting at the specified Blender frame
Include shell mass for surface elements: Include shell mass for surface elements of volume solids
Include this object in the simulation: Include this object in the simulation
Include this pin in the simulation: Include this pin in the simulation
Indicates if the group is active: Indicates if the group is active
Inflation pressure applied uniformly alo: Inflation pressure applied uniformly along face normals (Pa)
Inserted keyframes on {count} pin vertic: Inserted keyframes on {count} pin vertices at frame {frame}
Inter-grain friction coefficient of the: Inter-grain friction coefficient of the granular (sand) body
Interval for auto-saving the simulation: Interval for auto-saving the simulation state
JSON string storing mesh topology hash f: JSON string storing mesh topology hash for validation
Keyframe animation transfers automatical: Keyframe animation transfers automatically; capture is for deformers
Keyframe deletion not applicable for cur: Keyframe deletion not applicable for curve pins
Keyframing not supported for curve pins: Keyframing not supported for curve pins
Largest-extent principal axis, resolved: Largest-extent principal axis, resolved dynamically from the simulated geometry
Limit how long this pin is active: Limit how long this pin is active
Linear density of the rod material: Linear density of the rod material
Local directory of the ppf-contact-solve: Local directory of the ppf-contact-solver repo (the server runs from here)
MCP server may still be running - check: MCP server may still be running - check console for details
MCP server started on alternative port {: MCP server started on alternative port {actual_port} (requested port {original_port} was unavailable)
MCP server started successfully on port: MCP server started successfully on port {actual_port}
Mass of a single sand particle, in grams: Mass of a single sand particle, in grams (sent to the solver in kilograms)
Maximum number of PCG iterations before: Maximum number of PCG iterations before divergence
Maximum number of lines to keep in the c: Maximum number of lines to keep in the console
Maximum penetration depth. If a vertex i: Maximum penetration depth. If a vertex is embedded deeper than this inside the collider, it passes through — contact and CCD are both ignored. Must be > 0.
Maximum stretch beyond rest length, as a: Maximum stretch beyond rest length, as a percentage (1% allows 1% stretch)

Middle-extent principal axis, resolved d: Middle-extent principal axis, resolved dynamically from the simulated geometry

Move by delta over time range: Move by delta over time range
Name: Name

Number of frames this pin is active for: Number of frames this pin is active for
Number of frames with inactive momentum: Number of frames with inactive momentum (0 to disable)
Number of non-zero entries in the contac: Number of non-zero entries in the contact matrix
Object '{name}' has {count} duplicate fa: Object '{name}' has {count} duplicate face(s) (two triangles sharing the same three vertices), usually from doubled geometry. Select the mesh in Edit Mode and run Mesh > Merge > By Distance (or delete the duplicate faces) before assigning.
Object '{name}' is a Linked Duplicate (s: Object '{name}' is a Linked Duplicate (shares mesh data with {sibling!r}). Make it single-user (Object > Relations > Make Single User > Object & Data) before assigning.
Object '{name}' is already in another gr: Object '{name}' is already in another group
Object '{name}' is library-linked and ca: Object '{name}' is library-linked and cannot be assigned
Object '{name}' is not a particle mesh. Convert to particle mesh first.

Object has Blender keyframes — these ops: Object has Blender keyframes — these ops will be ignored
Object to move (will snap to Object B): Object to move (will snap to Object B)
Objects missing UUID: {names}{more}. Run: Objects missing UUID: {names}{more}. Run UUID Migration first.
On fetch, move every stitched vertex exa: On fetch, move every stitched vertex exactly onto its stitch target so seams appear joined. Applies to all stitch pairs. Turn off to keep the raw simulated gap between stitched parts
One or both objects not found: One or both objects not found

Painless Differentiable Rotation Dynamic: Painless Differentiable Rotation Dynamics: exactly-rigid body whose surface mesh moves as a single best-fit rigid transform (no tetrahedralization)
Parameters have changed since the last t: Parameters have changed since the last transfer. Click "Update Params" before resuming.
Parameters have changed since the last transfer. Click "Update Params" before running.

Path too long: cache files reach {chars}: Path too long: cache files reach {chars} chars (Windows limit {limit})
Per-grain radius of the granular (sand): Per-grain radius of the granular (sand) particles
Physical grain radius (also the contact: Physical grain radius (also the contact skin). Locked after conversion, since the non-overlapping spacing is derived from it.
Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': empty frame r: Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': empty frame range (start={start}, end={end})
Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': no pinned ver: Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': no pinned vertices to capture
Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': torque cannot: Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': torque cannot be combined with captured embedded animation
Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': unexpected sa: Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': unexpected sample shape {shape} at frame {frame}
Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': vertex count: Pin '{pin}' on '{object}': vertex count dropped below pin's max index at frame {frame} (have {count} verts, need >{max_index}). A topology-changing modifier moved above the deformer mid-capture, or the mesh was edited; re-bind the pin and retry.
Pin capture: invalid or STATIC group: Pin capture: invalid or STATIC group
Pin capture: only mesh pins can be captu: Pin capture: only mesh pins can be captured
Pin capture: pin identifier is missing t: Pin capture: pin identifier is missing the vertex group

Pin every vertex to enable rest-pose tra: Pin every vertex to enable rest-pose tracking
Pin has Move/Spin/Scale/Torque operation: Pin has Move/Spin/Scale/Torque operations; keyframed animation cannot be combined with them
Pin has manual keyframes (vertex-co fcur: Pin has manual keyframes (vertex-co fcurves); press Delete All Keyframes first, then re-run Capture Deformation
Pin is captured from the depsgraph; pres: Pin is captured from the depsgraph; press Clear Deformation Cache first before adding manual keyframes
Pin is keyframed; remove its keyframed a: Pin is keyframed; remove its keyframed animation before adding Move/Spin/Scale/Torque operations
Pin object has no deforming modifier sta: Pin object has no deforming modifier stack (Armature, Lattice, Mesh Deform, Shape Keys, ...); Capture Deformation has nothing to record
Pin this PDRD body and lock its rotation: Pin this PDRD body and lock its rotation to a single principal axis (a hinge / pin joint). Build gears by hinging each gear to its axle and letting tooth contact transmit the torque

Plasticity ignored: captured rest shape: Plasticity ignored: captured rest shape takes over

Rest-length scale for rod edges; <1 shri: Rest-length scale for rod edges; <1 shrinks the rod, >1 extends it. Maps to the solver's 'length-factor' rod parameter
Restrict collision detection to specific: Restrict collision detection to specific time windows per object
Root directory where ppf-cts-server.exe: Root directory where ppf-cts-server.exe is located
Rotate around an axis over a time range: Rotate around an axis over a time range
Rotate around an axis over time: Rotate around an axis over time
SOLID hard pin only: tet vertices whose: SOLID hard pin only: tet vertices whose diffused pin weight reaches this threshold are held as hard kinematic fixes; lower-weight vertices stay soft-pulled. Lower it toward 0 to hold more of the pinned surface region rigidly, raise it to soften the skirt. Interior vertices are never hard-fixed (they would crash the solver). No effect on pull pins or non-SOLID groups
Sample the pin's vertices from the depsg:
Sample the pin's vertices from the depsgraph each frame and
    store them as a captured-animation cache the solver consumes in
    place of manual keyframes
Save current material parameters to a pr: Save current material parameters to a profile.
Save current pin operations to a profile: Save current pin operations to a profile.
Save current scene parameters to a profi: Save current scene parameters to a profile.
Save the simulation state on the final f: Save the simulation state on the final frame before the solver exits, so the result stays resumable even when auto-save is off
Scale center in the op's local frame (ob: Scale center in the op's local frame (object-rotated, pre-translation). Matches world coords only when the object transform is identity.
Scale factor along the UV X direction; <: Scale factor along the UV X direction; <1 shrinks, >1 extends
Scale factor along the UV Y direction; <: Scale factor along the UV Y direction; <1 shrinks, >1 extends
Scale from a center over a time range: Scale from a center over a time range

Select a vertex group to pin: Select a vertex group to pin
Select object for collision window editi: Select object for collision window editing

Select one or more mesh objects: Select one or more mesh objects
Select which PDRD body's hinge to edit: Select which PDRD body's hinge to edit
Select which object's reference rest ang: Select which object's reference rest angle to edit
Session id stamped on artifacts produced: Session id stamped on artifacts produced by this project
Sets what the Young's Modulus field abov: Sets what the Young's Modulus field above means. When enabled (default) it is a density-normalized value in Pa/ρ, the solver's native convention: changing a body's density alone leaves its motion unchanged. Keep it on to match existing scenes. Disable it to enter a true Young's modulus in pascals (for example a value from a material reference table); the addon then divides it by this group's density before sending it to the solver, so a denser body of the same material is correspondingly stiffer to move
Show gravity direction preview in viewpo: Show gravity direction preview in viewport

Show velocity directions in viewport for: Show velocity directions in viewport for all objects in this group
Show wind direction preview in viewport: Show wind direction preview in viewport
Signed spin speed in degrees per second: Signed spin speed in degrees per second about the chosen axis (0 = no spin)
Simplify the input surface before tetrah: Simplify the input surface before tetrahedralization
Single-level additive aggregate-Schwarz;: Single-level additive aggregate-Schwarz; fewer iterations on systems mixing stiff and soft elements, but heavier per iteration and can OOM on large contact counts
Size of data to transfer in MB: Size of data to transfer in MB

Stiffness scale for this pin's moving (a: Stiffness scale for this pin's moving (animated) hard constraint force. 1.0 is the default; raise it if an animated pin lags or wobbles away from its target, lower it for a softer hold. Has no effect on a stationary pin or a Pull pin
Stiffness-proportional Rayleigh damping: Stiffness-proportional Rayleigh damping for shell and rod bending (seconds), usually smaller than deformation damping; 0 disables it
Stiffness-proportional Rayleigh damping for stretch/membrane/solid deformation (seconds). Damps high-frequency deformation; 0 disables it

TetGen maximum tetrahedron volume (-a),: TetGen maximum tetrahedron volume (-a), in object units; caps interior cell size for a finer mesh. 0 leaves it uncapped
TetGen quality bound (-q): smaller force: TetGen quality bound (-q): smaller forces rounder cells via more interior Steiner points. The input surface is never touched

Two-level additive Schwarz with a coarse: Two-level additive Schwarz with a coarse correction over the connectivity partition; reduces the worst-case PCG iteration count on stiff multibody contact
UDP port for addon reload server: UDP port for addon reload server
UUID of the currently selected group: UUID of the currently selected group
UUID of the object group (optional, for: UUID of the object group (optional, for group properties)
Unfetched animation frames exist. Fetch: Unfetched animation frames exist. Fetch all animation frames first.
Uniform scale applied to all geometry be: Uniform scale applied to all geometry before simulating; results are scaled back so the scene stays at its authored size. Use it to simulate an over- or under-sized scene at a sensible physical scale (e.g. 0.1 simulates a 15 m mesh at 1.5 m). Only geometry and relative contact gaps scale; gravity and absolute gaps do not
Uniform scale factor for solid material;: Uniform scale factor for solid material; <1 shrinks, >1 extends
Use a shorter solver path, or enable Win: Use a shorter solver path, or enable Windows long paths
Use a single vertex picked in Edit Mode: Use a single vertex picked in Edit Mode
Use frame rate in output. If unchecked,: Use frame rate in output. If unchecked, FPS field is shown.
Use group bounding box diagonal to calcu: Use group bounding box diagonal to calculate contact gap
Use local Windows native build with CUDA: Use local Windows native build with CUDA
Use max(friction_A, friction_B); the gri: Use max(friction_A, friction_B); the grippier side wins
Use min(friction_A, friction_B); the mor: Use min(friction_A, friction_B); the more slippery side wins
Use pull force instead of hard constrain: Use pull force instead of hard constraint
Use the angle of the initial pose as res: Use the angle of the initial pose as rest
User-entered center in the op's local fr: User-entered center in the op's local frame (object-rotated, before the world translation is applied — equals world coords only when the object transform is identity)
Volume density of the PDRD body; mass is: Volume density of the PDRD body; mass is the density times the enclosed volume of the surface mesh
Volume density of the solid material: Volume density of the solid material
Which principal (PCA) axis of the rest s: Which principal (PCA) axis of the rest shape is the free hinge axle, like Blender's torque-axis dropdown
Young's modulus for the rod material: Young's modulus for the rod material
Young's modulus for the shell material: Young's modulus for the shell material
Young's modulus for the solid material: Young's modulus for the solid material
and replaced by a loose-vertex particle: and replaced by a loose-vertex particle cloud.
no real physics. Are you sure you want t: no real physics. Are you sure you want to run?
would re-deform the baked shape keys at: would re-deform the baked shape keys at playback.

{count} object(s) hidden in the viewport: {count} object(s) hidden in the viewport were not exported: {names}
{count} rod/curve object(s) not exported: {count} rod/curve object(s) not exported (unsupported by this cache export): {names}
